owner_operator_stated: Founded October 1999 by Dr. Paul Singh and Dr. Pradeep Khurana (per vvdental.com/about-us/); the team page lists a combined roster across all three locations (Romeoville, Naperville, Montgomery), so not all 13 named doctors necessarily practice at this specific Romeoville address.

openings.title: Dental team members (dentists, hygienists, dental assistants) - Chicagoland locations incl. Romeoville

notes: Address (441 N Weber Rd, Romeoville, IL 60446) and phone (815) 372-0100 corroborated exactly on the practice's own homepage. Site indicates Valley View Dental is a 3-location group (Romeoville, Naperville, Montgomery) with a large shared clinical staff and an active careers page recruiting for dental roles across all locations; specific current openings/titles were not itemized in the sources reviewed.

owner_operator_stated: Practice branded 'Zale, Sharma, & Dental Associates' (full legal-style name 'Zale, Sharma, Ruginis & Dental Associates' per third-party listings). Staff page names Kenneth R. Zale, D.D.S. and Dr. Priyanka Sharma; no explicit ownership statement, but practice name directly reflects the named doctors. 'Ruginis' appears in the practice name and in a third-party directory listing but was not independently named/credentialed on the practice's own website pages reviewed.
notes: Address (215 W. Romeo Rd. #102, Romeoville, IL 60446) corroborated exactly on the practice's own site. Practice also has a second location in Lockport, IL (856 N State St), so this is a 2-location independent group, not a single-office practice.

public_practice_name: Elite Smiles of Mokena (formerly Patterson Dental Center / Garnet L Patterson DDS, Ltd)
owner_operator_stated: The record entity 'Garnet L Patterson DDS, Ltd' (d/b/a Patterson Dental Center) at 19721 Wolf Rd, Mokena, IL 60448, (708) 479-5865, now operates under the brand 'Elite Smiles of Mokena' at the same exact address and phone number (confirmed on elitesmilesofmokena.com/contact-us/). The vendor hint domain (pdhealthysmiles.com) 301-redirects to a DIFFERENT sibling brand, 'Elite Smiles of New Lenox' (2073 E Laraway Rd, New Lenox, IL), which does NOT match this record's address/phone. A third-party directory (HealthViber) describes 'Elite Smiles of Mokena' as 'Formerly Patterson Dental' and still lists Dr. Garnet Patterson, DDS among its dentists alongside Dr. Affaf Saddy and Dr. William Sensenbrenner, suggesting Patterson's practice was rebranded/absorbed into a multi-location 'Elite Smiles' group rather than continuing as an independent single-doctor LTD.
notes: Successor/rebrand scenario: address+phone now belong to 'Elite Smiles of Mokena', part of a multi-location 'Elite Smiles' brand (sibling location: Elite Smiles of New Lenox). The vendor_website_hint (pdhealthysmiles.com) is stale and redirects to the New Lenox sibling, not this location — flagged per corroboration rule as a wrong-address match that would have caused a false positive if not checked further via search.

owner_operator_stated: Dr. Leon J. Witkowski Jr. founded the practice in 1976 (relocated to this Mokena address in 1998). His son, Dr. LJ Witkowski III, joined in 2005 and took over formal leadership in 2015, while Dr. Witkowski Jr. continues to treat patients — a multi-generational family practice, per witkowskidental.com and third-party listings. Record entity name 'Leon J Witkowski Jr DDS Ltd' matches the founder's name exactly.
notes: Address (19665 S La Grange Rd / La Grange Rd, Mokena, IL 60448) and phone (708) 479-9888 corroborated exactly on the practice's own homepage. Single-location independent family practice; no DSO/multi-location group affiliation found. No careers/hiring page located (a 2019 newsletter mentioning a past hire is outdated, not a current opening).

owner_operator_stated: The record entity 'Keith W. Jaeschke, D.D.S., P.C.' at 1545 Creek Dr, Morris, IL 60450, (815) 942-0182, now maps exactly by address and phone to 'Bell and King Dental Associates' (established 2015), led by Dr. Matthew P. Bell, D.M.D. and Dr. Darrin S. King, D.D.S., with associate Dr. Lauren Nicholson, D.M.D. No Dr. Jaeschke appears on the current practice website. A Yelp listing under the slug 'jaeschke-keith-w-dds-morris' now displays as 'Bell and King Dental Associates,' and Matthew Bell's LinkedIn profile lists him as 'Dentist at Jaeschke & Associates,' consistent with Bell (and King) having succeeded Dr. Jaeschke's practice at this address.
notes: Successor scenario: the practice name, and all named doctors, changed entirely from the record entity (Jaeschke) to a different independent group (Bell and King Dental Associates), while address and phone stayed the same. No evidence found that this is a DSO/corporate brand — appears to be a small independent group practice founded by former associates.

owner_operator_stated: Practice is named 'Halkyard Family Dental' and operated by Dr. Douglas Halkyard and Dr. Scott Halkyard, per dedicated bio pages on the practice's own domain ('Meet Dr. Douglas Halkyard' and 'Meet Dr. Scott Halkyard', both indexed under halkyardfamilydental.com/about-us/). No explicit statement of which is the founder/owner, but the practice name matches the doctors' shared surname.
notes: Direct WebFetch to halkyardfamilydental.com returned HTTP 403 (bot-blocked); address (110 E Jackson St, Morris, IL 60450) and phone (815) 942-0830 corroborated via search-engine-indexed page titles from the practice's own domain (e.g. contact-us page title literally embeds the address) plus third-party directories (Yelp, WebMD, CareCredit) all matching. No DSO/multi-location group evidence found — appears to be an independent 2-dentist family practice. No careers page found.
